title: 40 inch Light Gold Number 34 Balloons 43th Birthday Balloon White Gold Number Balloon Champagne Gold Balloons Birthday Wedding Party digital Decorations (Number 34 or 43)
features: Package: 2pcs 40 inch light gold balloon (not inflated)

Can be inflated with helium or air, use the pump or straw to inflate the balloon. When the inflation is completed, please put the ball to clamp flat, the ball will automatically come out sealing glue and last for a long time. release the helium and reuse the balloons.

Numbers can be combined by your will.Easily hung on ceilings with strings or attached to the wall with adhesive tape.This balloon is self-sealing, no binding with fingers required.A filling of 80% to 90% is enough, please do not overfill the balloon so that it will not burst.
Material is aluminium film, colour uniform, spherical beautiful.
Ideal for a birthday party, wedding, Christmas, New Year's Eve, Halloween, anniversary, baby shower, graduation party.Perfect for all occasions.
description: Product Description Huge light gold number balloons are very clever to match various scenes These light gold big number balloons beautiful color,the will make your party brighter and more beautiful,very suitable for memorial days,such as birthday parties,wedding anniversary,graduation anniversarys,baby shower,bridal shower,etc. How to use aluminum foil balloons correctly: 1.found self-sealing valve 2.inflate with air pump or straw to blow air into the balloon must be slow and the filling should not exceed 90% to avoid cracking. 3.can be reused,shrink the balloon with a straw after the party. note:Sharp objects,dirty floors,direct sunlight and excessive squeezing can cause damage or explosion.
